description_long: This is a tall, lattice-structured metal tower with a square cross-section, designed for supporting electrical and communication equipment. At the top, there is a platform with railings, housing several mounted devices including large dish antennas, a vertical antenna mast, and smaller electronic boxes. The lattice framework is constructed from crisscrossed metal beams, providing both strength and minimal wind resistance. The tower is predominantly metallic gray, with some white elements on the mounted equipment. No visible power lines are attached, and there are no insulator stacks or warning signs present. The structure is fixed and intended for outdoor installation in urban or suburban environments.
description: A tall, metallic lattice tower with a platform at the top supporting antennas and electronic equipment. The structure is gray and white, with a robust, open-frame design.
description_view_0: The tower is seen from the side, showing the lattice structure and a clear view of the top platform with antennas and dishes.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile of the platform, with the dish antenna and vertical mast more prominently visible.
description_view_2: The lattice framework is clearly visible, and the mounted equipment on the platform is seen from a slightly different angle, showing the arrangement of antennas.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the tower is shown, with the platform and attached equipment visible, including the dish and vertical antenna.
attribute_arrangement_of_crossarms: There are no visible crossarms; the top platform serves as the main horizontal structure, supporting antennas and equipment.
attribute_configuration_of_attached_powe: No power lines are visibly attached; the structure is dedicated to supporting communication equipment with no visible electrical circuits or phase arrangements.
